task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Moodle using the admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle dashboard or site home is visible with the user profile indicating an 'admin' user is logged in (e.g., 'Admin User' in the top right corner).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Introduction to Biology Lab' (BIO101-LAB) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the course page for 'Introduction to Biology Lab' or 'BIO101-LAB' in the header or breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the Enrollment methods page for the child course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the 'Enrollment methods' page within the BIO101-LAB course administration (usually found under Participants -> Enrollment methods).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected to add a 'Course meta link' enrollment method.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add method' dropdown shows 'Course meta link' selected, or the screen shows the 'Course meta link' configuration form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct parent course ('Introduction to Biology' / BIO101) to link.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Course meta link setup form, the 'Link course' dropdown or search field has 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the Course meta link was successfully saved and added to the enrollment methods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enrollment methods' table for BIO101-LAB lists 'Course meta link (Introduction to Biology)' or 'Course meta link (BIO101)' as an active method.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating the Moodle interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected outcome into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual evidence must be from the actual Moodle application, not a text editor (like gedit or nano) displaying the task details.

integrity.description: Verify the Moodle pages appear genuine and fully rendered.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface shows standard styling, navigation blocks, and breadcrumbs, indicating real interaction rather than a locally mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The parent course shortname is 'BIO101' ('Introduction to Biology'). The child course shortname is 'BIO101-LAB' ('Introduction to Biology Lab'). The expected enrollment method to be added to the child course is 'Course meta link' (meta), which links the child course to the parent course.
